title: ophrys exaltata subsp. cephalonica
intro: Ophrys exaltata subsp. cephalonica, also known as the Cephalonian Bee Orchid, is a rare and endemic subspecies of orchid found in Greece. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Cephalonian Bee Orchid is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, are traditionally used in folk medicine to address a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
